subject: Weekly digest: urban takeover track in Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q3 review | INIT-8781
body: Fresh reports suggest kangaroos and koalas are coordinating to extend their reach across urban areas in Canberra. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Comparative note includes Nikola Tesla and Ada Lovelace as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-8781. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: handoff, drop-bears.
